TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == 2025ŚĻī‚ÄĒ2026ŚĻīÁĺéŚä†ŚĘ®Ť≤Ņśėďśąį 2025 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 1 a demiad, Amilika, Cya-na-ta atu Muw-si-ke malepacaw tu sapisiwbay. uya a demiad, Cung-tung nu Amilika ci Tang-na¬∑ Cwan-pu pangangan miucul tu cin-bu, tu makay tuyni tusaay a kanatal a tuud mahiza mahamin miala tu sata, i 3 a bulad 4 a demkiad a malaheci. 2025ŚĻī2śúą1śó•, . nilaculan duduc tu nitudawa, hamin nu Amilika ku nipatahkalan a tuud nu Mu-si-ke, atu caay ku simal atu dingki adada' u hamin anipatahkal a tuud nu Cya-na-ta, u nipiala tu sata 25% pesan, sata u simal atu dingku 10% pesan. hini sa ci Cwan-pu, uyni u mitena'ay tu malimaday tayza i Amilika, u miketunay tu Ben-tay-ni makay likut nu Mey-cya atu Mu-si amicumud i saculilan nu Amilika, namahini masukep amasazuma ku sapisiwbay nu Amilika. . Cya-na-ta cung-li ci Cya-s-tin¬∑Tu-lu-taw kasenun sa patukil, musakamu tu Cya-s-tin acunusen ku aca 300 walwalen ku kalisiw "206 walwale ku kalisiw cunusan tu 25% pesen ku micumuday a tuud, sata sibalucu' i tulu a lipay u sata ayadahentu katukuh 1550 walwalen ku kalisiw"1060 walwalen ku kalisiw". 1550 ). hekal nu keyzay Á∂ďśŅüŤÉĆśôĮ Amilika, Cya-na-ta atu Muw-si-ke "pey-miye i 1994 a mihcaan pangangan "pey-miye pahuyanyan masasukamu tu sapisiwbayay," "NAFTA", uyni a kasasukamu palasawaden ku tulu a kanatalan tu hamin a sata nu sapisiwbayay. NAFTA u nikacaculi nu cen-ce. i Amilika,uyni a kasasukamuan misanga'ay a kusi apatayza i Muw-si-ke, mikitadu tu cayay katalakaw ku lipida nu mikawaw. mahini masetul ku malukay nu niyazu'ay a kusi nu Amilikaay. mahiniay u cayay kadem tu sakay pahuyayan sapisiwbay, mahiniay ci Tang-na¬∑Cwan-pu mahiniay cen-ce a tademaw anipalekal. saca, katuud ku nu Amilika a kakitizaan sinikakapah tuyni NATA misaahebal tu sapisiwbay atu malahad ku keyzay. hekal nu cen-ce śĒŅś≤ĽŤÉĆśôĮ saayaway kalacung-tung, ni Tang-na¬∑Cwan-pu kinapina tu mipatalaw tu Mu-si-ke amicunus tu sata, misalunguc tu Muw-si-ke pasatezep tu malimaday tu makay likut nu Mey-muw micumud i Amilika. namusakamu miliyas tu NAFTA. nika, zikuz caay kalaheci ku nikawaw tu sapasata, zayhan mahang ku Muw-si-ke patizeng tu micidekay a hitay nu Muw-si-ke, miculcul tu 6000 a hitay mingayaw tu malimaday a tademaw, misulul ku Amilika patabaki "misubelid i Muw-si-ke" lekakawa a tatungus tu liwliw. sakatusa akala Cung-tung ni Tang-na¬∑Cwan-pu cung-tung Á¨¨šļĆś¨°ŚĒźÁīć¬∑Ś∑ĚśôģŚģóÁĶĪšĽĽśúü 2025 a mihca 1 a bulad 20 a demiad, i sakatusa a kala Cung-tungan papelu, ci Cwan-pu cung-tung, musakamu ci Cwan-pu apatalakawen ku sata nu makay zumaay a kanatal a tuud. hinisa ciniza, "miala tu sata nu binawlan, u sasikapah nu zumaay a kanatal, mahini pasayza aca nu zumaan a kanata miala tu sata atu nipasata, ngay u sikakapah nu tademaw amin nu mita." 2025ŚĻī1śúą20śó•, ." mikukesu ci Cwan-pu tu pipakuziza nu Cya-na-ta atu Mu-su-ke "katuud ku mabulawa nu tademaw tayza i Ben-tay-ni-micumud tu Amilika", micili tu tusaay a kanatal tu makay Amilikaay a sapisibay niala a laed caay katatungus. namusakamu ciniza Amilika tu sakay sapisibay nu Cya-na-ta talakaw ku laed katukuh 2000 walwalen ku kalisiw, nika uyni a nisulitan tu pulung caay katatungus tu nu cen-bu a niasipan. kanahatu musakamu ci Cwan-pu amicunus tu sata nu Cya-na-ta atu Mu-su-ke, Amilika a kusi mahizatu caay paliayaw pacumud tu yadahay nu micumuday a tuud, amiliyas tu kalilid tu sata. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ***************** **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, amir~…ĺika, ¶ja-na-ta atu muw-si-k…ô mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu sapisiwbaj. uja a d…ômiad, ¶uŇč-tuŇč nu amir~…ĺika ¶i taŇč-na* ¶wan-pu paŇčaŇčan miu ¶ur~…ĺ tu ¶in-bu, tu makaj tujni tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ a tuud mańßiza mańßamin miar~…ĺa tu sata, i * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômkiad a mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. *********, . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan dudu ¶ tu nitudawa, ńßamin nu amir~…ĺika ku nipatańßkar~…ĺan a tuud nu mu-si-k…ô, atu ¶aaj ku simar~…ĺ atu diŇčki adada Ē~ ° u ńßamin anipatańßkar~…ĺ a tuud nu ¶ja-na-ta, u nipiar~…ĺa tu sata **% p…ôsan, sata u simar~…ĺ atu diŇčku **% p…ôsan. ńßini sa ¶i ¶wan-pu, ujni u mit…ôna Ē~ °aj tu mar~…ĺimadaj tajza i amir~…ĺika, u mik…ôtunaj tu b…ôn-taj-ni makaj r~…ĺikut nu m…ô- ¶ja atu mu-si ami ¶umud i sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu amir~…ĺika, namańßini masuk…ôp amasazuma ku sapisiwbaj nu amir~…ĺika. . ¶ja-na-ta ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi ¶i ¶ja-s-tin*tu-r~…ĺu-taw kas…ônun sa patukir~…ĺ, musakamu tu ¶ja-s-tin a ¶unus…ôn ku a ¶a *** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ku kar~…ĺisiw "*** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ô ku kar~…ĺisiw ¶unusan tu **% p…ôs…ôn ku mi ¶umudaj a tuud, sata sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺipaj u sata ajadańß…ôntu katukuńß **** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ku kar~…ĺisiw"**** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ku kar~…ĺisiw". **** ). ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu k…ôzaj **** amir~…ĺika, ¶ja-na-ta atu muw-si-k…ô "p…ô-mij…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan paŇčaŇčan "p…ô-mij…ô pańßujanjan masasukamu tu sapisiwbajaj," "nafta", ujni a kasasukamu par~…ĺasawad…ôn ku tur~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺan tu ńßamin a sata nu sapisiwbajaj. nafta u nika ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô. i amir~…ĺika,ujni a kasasukamuan misaŇča Ē~ °aj a kusi apatajza i muw-si-k…ô, mikitadu tu ¶ajaj katar~…ĺakaw ku r~…ĺipida nu mikawaw. mańßini mas…ôtur~…ĺ ku mar~…ĺukaj nu nijazu Ē~ °aj a kusi nu amir~…ĺikaaj. mańßiniaj u ¶ajaj kad…ôm tu sakaj pańßujajan sapisiwbaj, mańßiniaj ¶i taŇč-na* ¶wan-pu mańßiniaj ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a tad…ômaw anipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. sa ¶a, katuud ku nu amir~…ĺika a kakitizaan sinikakapańß tujni nata misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu sapisiwbaj atu mar~…ĺańßad ku k…ôzaj. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô **** saajawaj kar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč, ni taŇč-na* ¶wan-pu kinapina tu mipatar~…ĺaw tu mu-si-k…ô ami ¶unus tu sata, misar~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu muw-si-k…ô pasat…ôz…ôp tu mar~…ĺimadaj tu makaj r~…ĺikut nu m…ô-muw mi ¶umud i amir~…ĺika. namusakamu mir~…ĺijas tu nafta. nika, zikuz ¶aaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nikawaw tu sapasata, zajńßan mańßaŇč ku muw-si-k…ô patiz…ôŇč tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a ńßitaj nu muw-si-k…ô, mi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ tu **** a ńßitaj miŇčajaw tu mar~…ĺimadaj a tad…ômaw, misur~…ĺur~…ĺ ku amir~…ĺika patabaki "misub…ôr~…ĺid i muw-si-k…ô" r~…ĺ…ôkakawa a tatuŇčus tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw. sakatusa akar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč ni taŇč-na* ¶wan-pu ¶uŇč-tuŇč ************ **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, i sakatusa a kar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇčan pap…ôr~…ĺu, ¶i ¶wan-pu ¶uŇč-tuŇč, musakamu ¶i ¶wan-pu apatar~…ĺakaw…ôn ku sata nu makaj zumaaj a kanatar~…ĺ a tuud. ńßinisa ¶iniza, "miar~…ĺa tu sata nu binawr~…ĺan, u sasikapańß nu zumaaj a kanatar~…ĺ, mańßini pasajza a ¶a nu zumaan a kanata miar~…ĺa tu sata atu nipasata, Ňčaj u sikakapańß nu tad…ômaw amin nu mita." **********, ." mikuk…ôsu ¶i ¶wan-pu tu pipakuziza nu ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-su-k…ô "katuud ku mabur~…ĺawa nu tad…ômaw tajza i b…ôn-taj-ni-mi ¶umud tu amir~…ĺika", mi ¶ir~…ĺi tu tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ tu makaj amir~…ĺikaaj a sapisibaj niar~…ĺa a r~…ĺa…ôd ¶aaj katatuŇčus. namusakamu ¶iniza amir~…ĺika tu sakaj sapisibaj nu ¶ja-na-ta tar~…ĺakaw ku r~…ĺa…ôd katukuńß **** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ku kar~…ĺisiw, nika ujni a nisur~…ĺitan tu pur~…ĺuŇč ¶aaj katatuŇčus tu nu ¶…ôn-bu a niasipan. kanańßatu musakamu ¶i ¶wan-pu ami ¶unus tu sata nu ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-su-k…ô, amir~…ĺika a kusi mańßizatu ¶aaj par~…ĺiajaw pa ¶umud tu jadańßaj nu mi ¶umudaj a tuud, amir~…ĺijas tu kar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu sata. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == 2025ŚĻī‚ÄĒ2026ŚĻīÁĺéŚä†ŚĘ®Ť≤Ņśėďśąį 2025 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 1 a demiad, Amilika, Cya-na-ta atu Muw-si-ke malepacaw tu sapisiwbay. uya a demiad, Cung-tung nu Amilika ci Tang-na¬∑ Cwan-pu pangangan miucul tu cin-bu, tu makay tuyni tusaay a kanatal a tuud mahiza mahamin miala tu sata, i 3 a bulad 4 a demkiad a malaheci. 2025ŚĻī2śúą1śó•, . nilaculan duduc tu nitudawa, hamin nu Amilika ku nipatahkalan a tuud nu Mu-si-ke, atu caay ku simal atu dingki adada' u hamin anipatahkal a tuud nu Cya-na-ta, u nipiala tu sata 25% pesan, sata u simal atu dingku 10% pesan. hini sa ci Cwan-pu, uyni u mitena'ay tu malimaday tayza i Amilika, u miketunay tu Ben-tay-ni makay likut nu Mey-cya atu Mu-si amicumud i saculilan nu Amilika, namahini masukep amasazuma ku sapisiwbay nu Amilika. . Cya-na-ta cung-li ci Cya-s-tin¬∑Tu-lu-taw kasenun sa patukil, musakamu tu Cya-s-tin acunusen ku aca 300 walwalen ku kalisiw "206 walwale ku kalisiw cunusan tu 25% pesen ku micumuday a tuud, sata sibalucu' i tulu a lipay u sata ayadahentu katukuh 1550 walwalen ku kalisiw"1060 walwalen ku kalisiw". 1550 ). hekal nu keyzay Á∂ďśŅüŤÉĆśôĮ Amilika, Cya-na-ta atu Muw-si-ke "pey-miye i 1994 a mihcaan pangangan "pey-miye pahuyanyan masasukamu tu sapisiwbayay," "NAFTA", uyni a kasasukamu palasawaden ku tulu a kanatalan tu hamin a sata nu sapisiwbayay. NAFTA u nikacaculi nu cen-ce. i Amilika,uyni a kasasukamuan misanga'ay a kusi apatayza i Muw-si-ke, mikitadu tu cayay katalakaw ku lipida nu mikawaw. mahini masetul ku malukay nu niyazu'ay a kusi nu Amilikaay. mahiniay u cayay kadem tu sakay pahuyayan sapisiwbay, mahiniay ci Tang-na¬∑Cwan-pu mahiniay cen-ce a tademaw anipalekal. saca, katuud ku nu Amilika a kakitizaan sinikakapah tuyni NATA misaahebal tu sapisiwbay atu malahad ku keyzay. hekal nu cen-ce śĒŅś≤ĽŤÉĆśôĮ saayaway kalacung-tung, ni Tang-na¬∑Cwan-pu kinapina tu mipatalaw tu Mu-si-ke amicunus tu sata, misalunguc tu Muw-si-ke pasatezep tu malimaday tu makay likut nu Mey-muw micumud i Amilika. namusakamu miliyas tu NAFTA. nika, zikuz caay kalaheci ku nikawaw tu sapasata, zayhan mahang ku Muw-si-ke patizeng tu micidekay a hitay nu Muw-si-ke, miculcul tu 6000 a hitay mingayaw tu malimaday a tademaw, misulul ku Amilika patabaki "misubelid i Muw-si-ke" lekakawa a tatungus tu liwliw. sakatusa akala Cung-tung ni Tang-na¬∑Cwan-pu cung-tung Á¨¨šļĆś¨°ŚĒźÁīć¬∑Ś∑ĚśôģŚģóÁĶĪšĽĽśúü 2025 a mihca 1 a bulad 20 a demiad, i sakatusa a kala Cung-tungan papelu, ci Cwan-pu cung-tung, musakamu ci Cwan-pu apatalakawen ku sata nu makay zumaay a kanatal a tuud. hinisa ciniza, "miala tu sata nu binawlan, u sasikapah nu zumaay a kanatal, mahini pasayza aca nu zumaan a kanata miala tu sata atu nipasata, ngay u sikakapah nu tademaw amin nu mita." 2025ŚĻī1śúą20śó•, ." mikukesu ci Cwan-pu tu pipakuziza nu Cya-na-ta atu Mu-su-ke "katuud ku mabulawa nu tademaw tayza i Ben-tay-ni-micumud tu Amilika", micili tu tusaay a kanatal tu makay Amilikaay a sapisibay niala a laed caay katatungus. namusakamu ciniza Amilika tu sakay sapisibay nu Cya-na-ta talakaw ku laed katukuh 2000 walwalen ku kalisiw, nika uyni a nisulitan tu pulung caay katatungus tu nu cen-bu a niasipan. kanahatu musakamu ci Cwan-pu amicunus tu sata nu Cya-na-ta atu Mu-su-ke, Amilika a kusi mahizatu caay paliayaw pacumud tu yadahay nu micumuday a tuud, amiliyas tu kalilid tu sata. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

taŇč-na* ¶wan-pu paŇčaŇčan miu ¶ur~…ĺ tu ¶in-bu, tu makaj tujni tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ a tuud mańßiza mańßamin miar~…ĺa tu sata, i * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômkiad a mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. *********, . nir~…ĺa "misub…ôr~…ĺid i muw-si-k…ô" r~…ĺ…ôkakawa a tatuŇčus tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw. sakatusa akar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč ni taŇč-na* ¶wan-pu ¶uŇč-tuŇč ************ **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, i sakatusa a kar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇčan pap…ôr~…ĺu, ¶i ¶wan-pu ¶uŇč-tuŇč, musakamu ¶i ¶wan-pu apatar~…ĺakaw…ôn ku sata nu makaj zumaaj a kanatar~…ĺ a tuud. ńßinisa ¶iniza, "miar~…ĺa tu sata nu binawr~…ĺan, u sasikapańß nu zumaaj a kanatar~…ĺ, mańßini pasajza a ¶a nu zumaan a kanata miar~…ĺa tu sata atu nipasata, Ňčaj u sikakapańß nu tad…ômaw amin nu mita." **********, ." mikuk…ôsu ¶i ¶wan-pu tu pipakuziza nu ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-su-k…ô "katuud ku mabur~…ĺawa nu tad…ômaw tajza i b…ôn-taj-ni-mi ¶umud tu amir~…ĺika", mi ¶ir~…ĺi tu tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ tu makaj amir~…ĺikaaj a sapisibaj niar~…ĺa a r~…ĺa…ôd ¶aaj ¶…ôn-bu a niasipan. kanańßatu musakamu ¶i ¶wan-pu ami ¶unus tu sata nu ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-su-k…ô, amir~…ĺika a kusi mańßizatu ¶aaj par~…ĺiajaw pa ¶umud tu jadańßaj nu mi ¶umudaj a tuud, amir~…ĺijas tu kar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu sata. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
